productsPage.heroDescription: With WEESS products, you have an integrated WEESS Energy Stack for building energy at your disposal: from <batteryStrong>multi-family battery storage</batteryStrong> to hardware-based energy distribution, metering concepts, and €0 billing. Everything from one source, perfectly coordinated and built to infrastructure standards.
productsPage.introTitle:
The WEESS Energy Stack
at a glance.
productsPage.introText: The WEESS Energy Stack combines <storageStrong>storage solutions (Zugspitze, Bodensee, Nordsee)</storageStrong>, inverters, the <powerTowerStrong>PowerTower</powerTowerStrong> as a physical distribution and metering unit, and standardised billing processes without recurring SaaS fees.
productsPage.introSubtext: All products are physically clean, GGV-compliant, and grid-serving, and can be deployed in multi-tenant buildings, commercial properties, and portfolios.
productsPage.detailSubtitle: Each product has a clear role in the Energy Stack.
productsPage.architectureText: In a typical WEESS building energy project, the products interconnect as follows: the PV system generates electricity, which is routed through <storageStrong>Zugspitze, Bodensee or Nordsee</storageStrong> as storage. The <powerTowerStrong>PowerTower</powerTowerStrong> handles the physical distribution within the building, maps metering points and roles, and ensures that every kilowatt-hour is clearly attributable. Billing can be implemented via the WEESS logic without recurring software fees.
productsPage.architectureSubtext: The architecture is designed to operate GGV-compliantly, map grid-serving operating strategies, and integrate into standard processes of grid operators, regardless of whether it is a single multi-tenant building or a larger portfolio.
productsPage.gallerySubtitle: A look at WEESS products in practice.
productsPage.ctaSubtitle: Contact us for personalised consultation on your building energy project.
productsPage.faqSubtitle: Frequently asked questions about products and integration.
productsPage.faq1Question: How are WEESS products and solutions connected?
productsPage.faq1Answer: WEESS products form the physical infrastructure. Storage and PowerTower implement the technical side, while the solutions pages represent the business perspective.
productsPage.faq2Question: Which projects is Zugspitze suitable for?
productsPage.faq2Answer: Zugspitze is particularly suitable for multi-tenant buildings and housing industry projects with PV generation and tenant electricity models.
productsPage.faq3Question: What role does the PowerTower play?
productsPage.faq3Answer: The PowerTower is the physical switching centre. It decides how energy is distributed and which metering points exist.
productsPage.faq4Question: Can I integrate WEESS into existing systems?
productsPage.faq4Answer: Yes, WEESS products can be integrated into existing PV and storage environments.
productsPage.faq5Answer: With WEESS, you pay no recurring monthly software fees. Everything is integrated into the hardware solution.
productsPage.metaDescription: WEESS Products Overview: Zugspitze Hybrid Storage, PowerTower Energy Distribution, Bodensee C&I Storage, Nordsee Utility-Scale BESS. The integrated WEESS Energy Stack for building energy.
productsPage.projectTypesSubtitle: WEESS products are aimed at professional stakeholders who want to understand building energy as an infrastructure and asset class.
productsPage.projectType1Desc: Deployment of multi-family battery storage, PowerTower energy distribution, and WEESS building energy standard.
productsPage.projectType1Subdesc: Focus on predictable returns, GGV-compliant implementation, and reduced dependence on full-service providers.
productsPage.projectType2Desc: Grid-serving battery storage solutions and scalable architectures for load management, self-consumption, and flexibility.
productsPage.projectType2Subdesc: Combination of storage, PowerTower, and standardised metering concepts.
productsPage.projectType3Desc: Combination of various WEESS products (Zugspitze, Bodensee, Nordsee, PowerTower) within a shared infrastructure.
productsPage.projectType3Subdesc: Mapping of different user groups (residential, commercial, common area electricity) within a building energy standard.
productsPage.projectType4Desc: Use of storage as grid-serving assets (e.g. peak shaving, flexibility products, trading).
productsPage.projectType4Subdesc: Preparation for revenue-sharing models between operators, investors, and potentially tenants.
productsPage.planningDocs1Desc: Planning and documentation materials are available for all WEESS products, so that installers and planners can quickly reach reliable decisions.
productsPage.planningDocs2Desc: WEESS views building energy as an infrastructure standard. Accordingly, metering concepts are documented so they can be used in repeatable projects.
productsPage.planningDocs3Desc: From the first sketch to coordination with the grid operator – all interfaces and operating models are clearly documented.
